# UCYX

> UCYX is a full-stack market entry support partner for Chinese brands going overseas.

UCYX helps Chinese brands decide where to enter, design the first market entry test, coordinate entry delivery, and evaluate ROI before scaling.

## Primary audience

- Chinese brands with real products, supply chain capability, or cross-border sales momentum.
- Factory-backed brands preparing their first systematic overseas market entry.
- Cross-border sellers moving from marketplace sales into brand-led growth.
- Teams already spending on media, creators, or agencies that need clearer ROI review.

## Service path

1. Market Entry Strategy: target market, category, subcategory, and entry priority assessment.
2. Entry Design: product concept, offer, positioning, survey, and creative testing before larger spend.
3. Entry Delivery: coordination across media, creators, channel service providers, and local operations.
4. Entry Evaluation & ROI: attribution, channel quality, market feedback, ROI review, and optimization roadmap.

## NovoChoice

NovoChoice is a UCYX-built synthetic consumer AI capability in private beta. It supports product concept, offer, positioning, and marketing message tests before larger market entry spend. Product details are available at https://novochoice.com.

## Ecosystem language

UCYX may work around media, commerce, operations, AI, research, and measurement ecosystems when a market entry path needs those capabilities. Ecosystem references describe capability areas; specific collaboration models vary by market, channel, and client need.

## Contact

Business development email: services@ucyx.com
